llm_extracted.ai_arm_selection_rationale: Only one AI arm available (human_ai). Human-only baseline is human_human (participants paired with another human).
llm_extracted.notes: The paper reports only a regression coefficient (β = 0.327, SE 0.024) for the human_ai vs human_human comparison on text quality. No means, SDs, t-statistics, F-statistics, or standardized effect sizes are provided for the direct arm comparison. The regression coefficient cannot be directly converted to Hedges' g without additional information about the outcome scale and variance. All other reported statistics are for moderator effects (task-oriented communication, interpersonal communication, delegation) rather than the main arm comparison.
source_quotes: In human evaluations of the quality of the ads, we found that human-AI teams produced higher quality ad text but lower quality ad images compared to human-human teams (Table 2).

computed.notes: The paper reports only a regression coefficient (β = 0.327, SE 0.024) for the human_ai vs human_human comparison on text quality.
